privileged_info_summary: The task crawls https://books.toscrape.com/, a real, publicly accessible sandbox website explicitly designed for learning web scraping. The website is maintained as a safe practice environment and contains synthetic test data (book titles, prices, and ratings are randomly assigned with no real-world meaning). The task requires exporting CSV data with Response Time column to /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/ and writing an analysis report to /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/ttfb_analysis.txt. The verifier validates minimum requirements: at least 20 data rows in the CSV and at least 400 characters in the report.
